case_title: SHARON HART VS. THE SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HART, SHARON SERVED OCT-24-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAY-19-2014. MAR-19-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HART, SHARON AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-19-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-17-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-24-2014
ARBITRATOR PHILIP SOCHAT KEITH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAY-30-2014 THROUGH AUG-28-2014.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR ROBERT BRUCE INGRAM.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR RICHARD DAVID SPOTSWOOD.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAY-29-2014.
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF MAY-30-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE.
